# New Epics to Implement

## Table Layout Improvements

In epic 111 you separated the table headers from the scrollable body to fix the janky scrolling issue. In epic 112 I had asked you to fix several issues. The result is that now the headers scroll with the body content instead of staying fixed, in place.

What I want is something that works like it did before we disconnected the headers but with the headers disconnected. So the headers should stay fixed in place and not scroll with the body content, and the vertical scrollbar should be on the far right of the table area and not scroll with the body content either.

I THINK you may need to create a separate container for the body that handles the vertical scroll bar and make that scroll bar virtually scroll the table content.

## Symbol Lookup

On modals such as "Add New Position" in the Open Positions screen, and "New Dividend or Deposit" on the Dividend Deposits screen, there is a symbol lookup field. When I type in that field, I get a dropdown of matching symbols. The problem is, if I have a filter set on the universe screen that hides the symbol I want to select these dropdowns can't find them because they are using the filtered universe as their source.

Since the data is read only, the best fix here may be live loading the symbol data for these dropdowns using another API route that doesn't apply the universe filters and does a lookup based on the text input rather than returning a fixed list of symbols. I think using httpResource may be appropriate here, but you can choose the best implementation approach.

## Summary Screen Reload

On the Account Summary screens, the screen continuously reloads the data and, subsequently, repaints the screen. There is no reason it should be reloading like this. The data should be loaded once when the screen is opened.
